advent.text: Watch therefore, for you don’t know when the lord of the house is coming—whether at evening, or at midnight, or when the rooster crows, or in the morning; lest, coming suddenly, he might find you sleeping.

As it is written in the book of the words of Isaiah the prophet, “The voice of one crying in the wilderness, ‘Make ready the way of the Lord. Make his paths straight. All flesh will see God’s salvation.’”
The voice of one who calls out, “Prepare the way of Yahweh in the wilderness! Make a level highway in the desert for our God.
Do this, knowing the time, that it is already time for you to awaken out of sleep, for salvation is now nearer to us than when we first believed.
The people who walked in darkness have seen a great light. The light has shined on those who lived in the land of the shadow of death.
Oh that you would tear the heavens, that you would come down, that the mountains might quake at your presence—

“Behold, I send my messenger, and he will prepare the way before me! The Lord, whom you seek, will suddenly come to his temple. Behold, the messenger of the covenant, whom you desire, is coming!” says Yahweh of Armies.
Watch therefore, for you don’t know in what hour your Lord comes.
Let your gentleness be known to all men. The Lord is at hand.
You also be patient. Establish your hearts, for the coming of the Lord is at hand.
He who testifies these things says, “Yes, I am coming soon.” Amen! Yes, come, Lord Jesus!
Therefore Yahweh will wait, that he may be gracious to you; and therefore he will be exalted, that he may have mercy on you, for Yahweh is a God of justice. Blessed are all those who wait for him.
Turn us again, God. Cause your face to shine, and we will be saved.

Rejoice greatly, daughter of Zion! Shout, daughter of Jerusalem! Behold, your King comes to you! He is righteous, and having salvation; lowly, and riding on a donkey, even on a colt, the foal of a donkey.
“Behold, the days come,” says Yahweh, “that I will perform that good word which I have spoken concerning the house of Israel and concerning the house of Judah.

christmas.text: The angel said to them, “Don’t be afraid, for behold, I bring you good news of great joy which will be to all the people. For there is born to you today, in David’s city, a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.
The Word became flesh and lived among us. We saw his glory, such glory as of the only born Son of the Father, full of grace and truth.
But when the fullness of the time came, God sent out his Son, born to a woman, born under the law, that he might redeem those who were under the law, that we might receive the adoption as children.
For a child is born to us. A son is given to us; and the government will be on his shoulders. His name will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.
Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice. Let the sea roar, and its fullness!

epiphany.text: Nations will come to your light, and kings to the brightness of your rising.

For from the rising of the sun even to its going down, my name is great among the nations, and in every place incense will be offered to my name, and a pure offering; for my name is great among the nations,” says Yahweh of Armies.

that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of those in heaven, those on earth, and those under the earth, and that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
“Where is he who is born King of the Jews? For we saw his star in the east, and have come to worship him.”

Indeed, he says, “It is too light a thing that you should be my servant to raise up the tribes of Jacob, and to restore the preserved of Israel. I will also give you as a light to the nations, that you may be my salvation to the end of the earth.”

lent.text: Tear your heart and not your garments, and turn to Yahweh, your God; for he is gracious and merciful, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness, and relents from sending calamity.
The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit. O God, you will not despise a broken and contrite heart.

To the Lord our God belong mercies and forgiveness; for we have rebelled against him. We haven’t obeyed Yahweh our God’s voice, to walk in his laws, which he set before us by his servants the prophets.
From that time, Jesus began to preach, and to say, “Repent! For the Kingdom of Heaven is at hand.”
Seek Yahweh while he may be found. Call on him while he is near.
Have mercy on me, God, according to your loving kindness. According to the multitude of your tender mercies, blot out my transgressions.
Create in me a clean heart, O God. Renew a right spirit within me.
I will get up and go to my father, and will tell him, “Father, I have sinned against heaven and in your sight.

If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us. If we confess our sins, he is faithful and righteous to forgive us the sins and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
Out of the depths I have cried to you, Yahweh. Lord, hear my voice. Let your ears be attentive to the voice of my petitions.
“Come now, and let’s reason together,” says Yahweh: “Though your sins are as scarlet, they shall be as white as snow. Though they are red like crimson, they shall be as wool.
“Therefore I will judge you, house of Israel, everyone according to his ways,” says the Lord Yahweh. “Return, and turn yourselves from all your transgressions, so iniquity will not be your ruin.
Yahweh, remember your tender mercies and your loving kindness, for they are from old times.
I acknowledged my sin to you. I didn’t hide my iniquity. I said, I will confess my transgressions to Yahweh, and you forgave the iniquity of my sin. Selah.
“Come! Let’s return to Yahweh; for he has torn us to pieces, and he will heal us; he has injured us, and he will bind up our wounds.

“Moreover when you fast, don’t be like the hypocrites, with sad faces. For they disfigure their faces that they may be seen by men to be fasting. Most certainly I tell you, they have received their reward.
For godly sorrow produces repentance leading to salvation, which brings no regret. But the sorrow of the world produces death.
He has not dealt with us according to our sins, nor repaid us for our iniquities.
All we like sheep have gone astray. Everyone has turned to his own way; and Yahweh has laid on him the iniquity of us all.
Let’s therefore draw near with boldness to the throne of grace, that we may receive mercy and may find grace for help in time of need.

holyweek.text: “Is it nothing to you, all you who pass by? Look, and see if there is any sorrow like my sorrow, which is brought on me, with which Yahweh has afflicted me in the day of his fierce anger.
“Now my soul is troubled. What shall I say? ‘Father, save me from this time’? But I came to this time for this cause.
And being found in human form, he humbled himself, becoming obedient to the point of death, yes, the death of the cross.
But he was pierced for our transgressions. He was crushed for our iniquities. The punishment that brought our peace was on him; and by his wounds we are healed.
But far be it from me to boast except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, through which the world has been crucified to me, and I to the world.

easter.text: saying, “The Lord is risen indeed, and has appeared to Simon!”
But thanks be to God, who gives us the victory through our Lord Jesus Christ.
If then you were raised together with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is, seated on the right hand of God.
Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who according to his great mercy caused us to be born again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,
and the Living one. I was dead, and behold, I am alive forever and ever. Amen. I have the keys of Death and of Hades.
Having then a great high priest who has passed through the heavens, Jesus, the Son of God, let’s hold tightly to our confession.
For Christ hasn’t entered into holy places made with hands, which are representations of the true, but into heaven itself, now to appear in the presence of God for us;
who also said, “You men of Galilee, why do you stand looking into the sky? This Jesus, who was received up from you into the sky, will come back in the same way as you saw him going into the sky.”
But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit has come upon you. You will be witnesses to me in Jerusalem, in all Judea and Samaria, and to the uttermost parts of the earth.”
But the hour comes, and now is, when the true worshipers will worship the Father in spirit and truth, for the Father seeks such to be his worshipers.
For as many as are led by the Spirit of God, these are children of God.

pentecost.text: The four living creatures, each one of them having six wings, are full of eyes around and within. They have no rest day and night, saying, “Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God, the Almighty, who was and who is and who is to come!”
For of him and through him and to him are all things. To him be the glory for ever! Amen.
But Yahweh is in his holy temple. Let all the earth be silent before him!”
Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight, Yahweh, my rock, and my redeemer.
I was glad when they said to me, “Let’s go to Yahweh’s house!”
Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, and into his courts with praise. Give thanks to him, and bless his name.
Yahweh, in the morning you will hear my voice. In the morning I will lay my requests before you, and will watch expectantly.
This is the day that Yahweh has made. We will rejoice and be glad in it!
Cause me to hear your loving kindness in the morning, for I trust in you. Cause me to know the way in which I should walk, for I lift up my soul to you.
Yahweh, be gracious to us. We have waited for you. Be our strength every morning, our salvation also in the time of trouble.
It is because of Yahweh’s loving kindnesses that we are not consumed, because his mercies don’t fail. They are new every morning. Great is your faithfulness.
Wake up, my glory! Wake up, lute and harp! I will wake up the dawn.
It is a good thing to give thanks to Yahweh, to sing praises to your name, Most High, to proclaim your loving kindness in the morning, and your faithfulness every night,
Wake up, harp and lyre! I will wake up the dawn.
My soul longs for the Lord more than watchmen long for the morning, more than watchmen for the morning.
God, you are my God. I will earnestly seek you. My soul thirsts for you. My flesh longs for you, in a dry and weary land, where there is no water.
From the rising of the sun to its going down, Yahweh’s name is to be praised.
Therefore I urge you, brothers, by the mercies of God, to present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable to God, which is your spiritual service.
Therefore he says, “Awake, you who sleep, and arise from the dead, and Christ will shine on you.”
I laid myself down and slept. I awakened, for Yahweh sustains me.
Always rejoice. Pray without ceasing. In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.
Yahweh, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth! You have set your glory above the heavens!
God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
How lovely are your dwellings, Yahweh of Armies!
Oh come, let’s sing to Yahweh. Let’s shout aloud to the rock of our salvation!
Yahweh, how many are your works! In wisdom, you have made them all. The earth is full of your riches.
Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
Yahweh is my light and my salvation. Whom shall I fear? Yahweh is the strength of my life. Of whom shall I be afraid?
I will bless Yahweh at all times. His praise will always be in my mouth.
Praise Yahweh, my soul! All that is within me, praise his holy name!
What will I give to Yahweh for all his benefits toward me?
I will lift up my eyes to the hills. Where does my help come from? My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.
Praise Yah, for it is good to sing praises to our God; for it is pleasant and fitting to praise him.
Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don’t lean on your own understanding. In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.
Behold, God is my salvation. I will trust, and will not be afraid; for Yah, Yahweh, is my strength and song; and he has become my salvation.”
You will keep whoever’s mind is steadfast in perfect peace, because he trusts in you.
but those who wait for Yahweh will renew their strength. They will mount up with wings like eagles. They will run, and not be weary. They will walk, and not faint.
Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they shall be filled.
“Come to me, all you who labor and are heavily burdened, and I will give you rest.
Again, therefore, Jesus spoke to them, saying, “I am the light of the world. He who follows me will not walk in the darkness, but will have the light of life.”
“I am the good shepherd. The good shepherd lays down his life for the sheep.
Jesus said to him, “I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father, except through me.
We know that all things work together for good for those who love God, for those who are called according to his purpose.
What then shall we say about these things? If God is for us, who can be against us?
Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope in the power of the Holy Spirit.
Now the Lord is the Spirit; and where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is liberty.
He has said to me, “My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.” Most gladly therefore I will rather glory in my weaknesses, that the power of Christ may rest on me.
Stand firm therefore in the liberty by which Christ has made us free, and don’t be entangled again with a yoke of bondage.
for by grace you have been saved through faith, and that not of yourselves; it is the gift of God,
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.
Set your mind on the things that are above, not on the things that are on the earth.
For God didn’t give us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.
Now faith is assurance of things hoped for, proof of things not seen.

Therefore let’s also, seeing we are surrounded by so great a cloud of witnesses, lay aside every weight and the sin which so easily entangles us, and let’s run with perseverance the race that is set before us, looking to Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith, who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising its shame, and has sat down at the right hand of the throne of God.
Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.
But if any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask of God, who gives to all liberally and without reproach, and it will be given to him.
casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.
You are of God, little children, and have overcome them, because greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world.
We love him, because he first loved us.
He who sits on the throne said, “Behold, I am making all things new.” He said, “Write, for these words of God are faithful and true.”

advent.text: Watch therefore, for you don’t know when the lord of the house is coming—whether at evening, or at midnight, or when the rooster crows, or in the morning; lest, coming suddenly, he might find you sleeping.
“Let your waist be dressed and your lamps burning. Be like men watching for their lord when he returns from the wedding feast, that when he comes and knocks, they may immediately open to him.
But at midnight there was a cry, ‘Behold! The bridegroom is coming! Come out to meet him!’
Therefore be watchful all the time, praying that you may be counted worthy to escape all these things that will happen, and to stand before the Son of Man.”
Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, then I will come in to him and will dine with him, and he with me.
It shall be said in that day, “Behold, this is our God! We have waited for him, and he will save us! This is Yahweh! We have waited for him. We will be glad and rejoice in his salvation!”
I wait for Yahweh. My soul waits. I hope in his word.
The night is far gone, and the day is near. Let’s therefore throw off the deeds of darkness, and let’s put on the armor of light.
For our citizenship is in heaven, from where we also wait for a Savior, the Lord Jesus Christ,
Be silent at the presence of the Lord Yahweh, for the day of Yahweh is at hand. For Yahweh has prepared a sacrifice. He has consecrated his guests.

lent.text: Let my prayer be set before you like incense; the lifting up of my hands like the evening sacrifice.
If you, Yah, kept a record of sins, Lord, who could stand?
But the tax collector, standing far away, wouldn’t even lift up his eyes to heaven, but beat his chest, saying, ‘God, be merciful to me, a sinner!’
Stand in awe, and don’t sin. Search your own heart on your bed, and be still. Selah.
Have mercy on me, Yahweh, for I am faint. Yahweh, heal me, for my bones are troubled.
For your name’s sake, Yahweh, pardon my iniquity, for it is great.
Have mercy on me, Yahweh, for I am in distress. My eye, my soul, and my body waste away with grief.
For I will declare my iniquity. I will be sorry for my sin.
Show us your loving kindness, Yahweh. Grant us your salvation.
Let us search and try our ways, and turn again to Yahweh.
“Yet even now,” says Yahweh, “turn to me with all your heart, and with fasting, and with weeping, and with mourning.”
Who knows whether God will not turn and relent, and turn away from his fierce anger, so that we might not perish?”
“For if you forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.
I tell you, no, but unless you repent, you will all perish in the same way.
Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you. Cleanse your hands, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you double-minded.

pentecost.text: even there your hand will lead me, and your right hand will hold me. If I say, “Surely the darkness will overwhelm me. The light around me will be night,”
I heard a loud voice out of heaven saying, “Behold, God’s dwelling is with people; and he will dwell with them, and they will be his people, and God himself will be with them as their God.
He appointed the moon for seasons. The sun knows when to set.
In peace I will both lay myself down and sleep, for you alone, Yahweh, make me live in safety.
He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty. I will say of Yahweh, “He is my refuge and my fortress; my God, in whom I trust.”
Let my prayer be set before you like incense; the lifting up of my hands like the evening sacrifice.
I will bless Yahweh, who has given me counsel. Yes, my heart instructs me in the night seasons.
Yahweh will command his loving kindness in the daytime. In the night his song shall be with me: a prayer to the God of my life.
when I remember you on my bed, and think about you in the night watches.
The day is yours, the night is also yours. You have prepared the light and the sun.
This is the message which we have heard from him and announce to you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.
Again, therefore, Jesus spoke to them, saying, “I am the light of the world. He who follows me will not walk in the darkness, but will have the light of life.”
They urged him, saying, “Stay with us, for it is almost evening, and the day is almost over.” He went in to stay with them.
Yahweh’s angel encamps around those who fear him, and delivers them.
Yahweh is your keeper. Yahweh is your shade on your right hand. The sun will not harm you by day, nor the moon by night.
Look! Praise Yahweh, all you servants of Yahweh, who stand by night in Yahweh’s house!
But no one says, ‘Where is God my Maker, who gives songs in the night,
With my soul I have desired you in the night. Yes, with my spirit within me I will seek you earnestly; for when your judgments are on the earth, the inhabitants of the world learn righteousness.
And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.
There will be no night, and they need no lamp light or sun light; for the Lord God will illuminate them. They will reign forever and ever.
I laid myself down and slept. I awakened, for Yahweh sustains me.
As for me, I shall see your face in righteousness. I shall be satisfied, when I awake, with seeing your form.
Surely goodness and loving kindness shall follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in Yahweh’s house forever.
One thing I have asked of Yahweh, that I will seek after: that I may dwell in Yahweh’s house all the days of my life, to see Yahweh’s beauty, and to inquire in his temple.
Into your hand I commend my spirit. You redeem me, Yahweh, God of truth.
For with you is the spring of life. In your light we will see light.
“Be still, and know that I am God. I will be exalted among the nations. I will be exalted on the earth.”
My soul rests in God alone. My salvation is from him.
Blessed be the Lord, who daily bears our burdens, even the God who is our salvation. Selah.
He will cover you with his feathers. Under his wings you will take refuge. His faithfulness is your shield and rampart.
For he will put his angels in charge of you, to guard you in all your ways.
He will not be afraid of evil news. His heart is steadfast, trusting in Yahweh.
Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.
Those who love your law have great peace. Nothing causes them to stumble.
He will not allow your foot to be moved. He who keeps you will not slumber.
Yahweh will keep you from all evil. He will keep your soul. Yahweh will keep your going out and your coming in, from this time forward, and forever more.
It is vain for you to rise up early, to stay up late, eating the bread of toil, for he gives sleep to his loved ones.
Yahweh will fulfill that which concerns me. Your loving kindness, Yahweh, endures forever. Don’t forsake the works of your own hands.
Where could I go from your Spirit? Or where could I flee from your presence?
When you lie down, you will not be afraid. Yes, you will lie down, and your sleep will be sweet.
He gives power to the weak. He increases the strength of him who has no might.
The sun will be no more your light by day, nor will the brightness of the moon give light to you, but Yahweh will be your everlasting light, and your God will be your glory.
Take my yoke upon you and learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart; and you will find rest for your souls.
Peace I leave with you. My peace I give to you; not as the world gives, I give to you. Don’t let your heart be troubled, neither let it be fearful.
For if we live, we live to the Lord. Or if we die, we die to the Lord. If therefore we live or die, we are the Lord’s.
Let’s not be weary in doing good, for we will reap in due season if we don’t give up.
“Be angry, and don’t sin.” Don’t let the sun go down on your wrath,
In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God.
And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body, and be thankful.
who died for us, that, whether we wake or sleep, we should live together with him.
Be free from the love of money, content with such things as you have, for he has said, “I will in no way leave you, neither will I in any way forsake you.”
There is no fear in love; but perfect love casts out fear, because fear has punishment. He who fears is not made perfect in love.
